creator: decke@FreeBSD.org
text:
Please repo-copy emulators/virtualbox-ose to emulators/virtualbox-ose-legacy and emulators/virtualbox-ose-kmod to emulators/virtualbox-ose-kmod-legacy. Once the repo-copies are done we will update emulators/virtualbox-ose to VirtualBox 4.0.6 and want to maintain the last stable version in the -legacy ports so that people have a fallback.

Discussed with: bapt@
